global.sectionDescription: Controls background extraction for agentic_os memory.
global.extractEveryEligibleTurns: How often to update global memory
global.extractEveryEligibleTurnsDesc: Update agentic_os memory once every N eligible conversations.

workspace.sectionDescription: Controls background extraction for normal agent workspace memory.
workspace.extractEveryEligibleTurns: How often to update workspace memory
workspace.extractEveryEligibleTurnsDesc: Update workspace memory once every N eligible conversations.
